ns0:entry.ns0:title: FreshRSS/FreshRSS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/FreshRSS/FreshRSS
Language: php
A free, self-hostable news aggregator…

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Leantime/leantime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Leantime/leantime
Language: php
Leantime is a goals focused project management system for non-project managers. Building with ADHD, Autism, and dyslexia in mind.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PHPMailer/PHPMailer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PHPMailer/PHPMailer
Language: php
The classic email sending library for PHP

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/mcp-adapter
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/mcp-adapter
Language: php
An MCP adapter that bridges the Abilities API to the Model Context Protocol, enabling MCP clients to discover and invoke WordPress plugin, theme, and core abilities programmatically.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: WordPress/wordpress-develop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/WordPress/wordpress-develop
Language: php
WordPress Develop, Git-ified. Synced from git://develop.git.wordpress.org/, including branches and tags! This repository is just a mirror of the WordPress subversion repository. Please include a link to a pre-existing ticket on https://core.trac.wordpress.org/ with every pull request.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cedar2025/Xboard
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cedar2025/Xboard
Language: php
High-performance panel based on V2board secondary development supporting new protocols and new features

ns0:entry.ns0:title: codeigniter4/CodeIgniter4
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/codeigniter4/CodeIgniter4
Language: php
Open Source PHP Framework (originally from EllisLab)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: coollabsio/coolify
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/coollabsio/coolify
Language: php
An open-source, self-hostable PaaS alternative to Vercel, Heroku & Netlify that lets you easily deploy static sites, databases, full-stack applications and 280+ one-click services on your own servers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: danielmiessler/SecLists
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/danielmiessler/SecLists
Language: php
SecLists is the security tester's companion. It's a collection of multiple types of lists used during security assessments, collected in one place. List types include usernames, passwords, URLs, sensitive data patterns, fuzzing payloads, web shells, and many more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: filamentphp/filament
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/filamentphp/filament
Language: php
A powerful open-source UI framework for Laravel • Build and ship apps & admin panels fast with Livewire

ns0:entry.ns0:title: grokability/snipe-it
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/grokability/snipe-it
Language: php
A free open source IT asset/license management system

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kimai/kimai
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kimai/kimai
Language: php
Kimai is the #1 open-source time-tracking application. From freelancers to companies and organisations - everyone can manage timesheets, generate reports, create invoices and so much more... Web-based multi-user application, available as On-Premise or SaaS version: https://www.kimai.org

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/boost
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/boost
Language: php
Laravel-focused MCP server for augmenting your AI powered local development experience.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: laravel/framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/laravel/framework
Language: php
Laravel is a web application framework with expressive, elegant syntax.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: livewire/livewire
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/livewire/livewire
Language: php
A full-stack framework for Laravel that takes the pain out of building dynamic UIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/all-in-one
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/all-in-one
Language: php
📦 The official Nextcloud installation method. Provides easy deployment and maintenance with most features included in this one Nextcloud instance.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nextcloud/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nextcloud/server
Language: php
☁️ Nextcloud server, a safe home for all your data

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pestphp/pest
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pestphp/pest
Language: php
Pest is an elegant PHP testing Framework with a focus on simplicity, meticulously designed to bring back the joy of testing in PHP.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pterodactyl/panel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pterodactyl/panel
Language: php
Pterodactyl® is a free, open-source game server management panel built with PHP, React, and Go. Designed with security in mind, Pterodactyl runs all game servers in isolated Docker containers while exposing a beautiful and intuitive UI to end users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: symfony/symfony
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/symfony/symfony
Language: php
The Symfony PHP framework
